get.summary:
Lists aggregated monthly meterings for the account identified by the given ID.
Each summary represents the total metering amount for one month.
Required permissions:
- read:payment_information

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

get.summary:
Lists detailed metering entries for a specific month for the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:payment_information

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year to filter meterings by (e.g., 2025).

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: The month to filter meterings by (1 = January, 12 = December).

get.summary:
Returns the usage breakdown for the account identified by the given ID, within the requested time range.
For parent billing accounts, the response aggregates usage across all child accounts.
Required permissions:
- read:payment_information

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: The inclusive start of the time range to return usage for.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: The exclusive end of the time range to return usage for. Must be after start_time.

pricingTier.description: Pricing tier the cluster was billed under (e.g., "standard", "premium").

v1BackupStorageConfig.description:
BackupStorageConfig describes placement and tier for the
backup-storage billable metric.

pricingTier.description: Pricing tier the cluster was billed under (e.g., "standard", "premium").

extraDiskGib.description: Extra disk attached to the cluster's active booking at the time of metering, in GiB.

v1ClusterExtraDiskConfig.description:
ClusterExtraDiskConfig describes placement and tier for the
cluster-extra-disk billable metric.

pricingTier.description: Pricing tier the cluster was billed under (e.g., "standard", "premium").

v1ClusterStorageTierConfig.description:
ClusterStorageTierConfig describes placement and storage tier for
the cluster-storage-tier billable metric.

ramGib.description: Amount of RAM per node, in GiB.

diskGib.description: Disk size per node, in GiB.

multiAz.description: Whether the cluster is configured for multi-AZ.

gpuEnabled.description: Whether the cluster has GPU enabled.

pricingTier.description: Pricing tier the cluster was billed under (e.g., "standard", "premium").

nodeCount.description: Number of nodes in the cluster's active booking at the time of metering.

v1ClusterUsageConfig.description:
ClusterUsageConfig describes the shape and placement of a cluster
for the cluster-usage billable metric.

items.description: The list of months that had usage in the requested time range.

v1GetUsageBreakdownResponse.title: GetUsageBreakdownResponse is the response from the GetUsageBreakdown function

pricingTier.description: Pricing tier the cluster was billed under (e.g., "standard", "premium").

v1InferenceConfig.description:
InferenceConfig describes placement, model and tier for the
inference-tokens billable metric.

items.description: List of detailed metering items for the specified month.

v1ListMeteringsResponse.title: ListMeteringsResponse is the response from the ListMeterings function

v1ListMonthlyMeteringsResponse.title: ListMonthlyMeterings is the response from the ListMonthlyMeterings function

accountId.description: The identifier of the account this metering item belongs to (in GUID format).

clusterId.description: The identifier of the cluster associated with this usage (in GUID format).

clusterName.description: The name of the cluster involved in this metering.

startTime.description: The start time of the metering window (UTC).

endTime.description: The end time of the metering window (UTC).

billableEntityId.description:
The identifier of the billable entity (in GUID format), such as a cluster
booking or another billable resource.

billableEntityReferenceName.description: A reference name of the billable entity (e.g. "sentence-transformers/all-minilm-l6-v2", "my-cluster-foobar").

billableEntityType.description: The type of the billable entity  (e.g., "cluster_booking", "resource_option", "backup", "inference_model").

pricePerHour.description: The unit price in millicents per hour (e.g., 4112 = $0.04112/hour).

usageHours.description: Usage duration in decimal hours. (e.g., 2.5 = 2 hours and 30 minutes).

amountMillicents.description: The total charge for this item, in millicents.

discountAmountMillicents.description: The total discount applied to this item, in millicents.

discountAmountPercent.description: The Discount applied as a percentage (e.g., 12.5).

currency.description: Currency of the different amount values, in ISO 4217 format (e.g., "USD").

clusterLabels.description: Labels associated with the cluster at the time of metering.

v1MeteringItem.description: Metering represents a detailed metering item.

month.description: The month this summary represents (1 = January, 12 = December).

amountMillicents.title:
Total amount for the month in millicents.
Example: 499900 = $4.999

currency.description: Currency of the amount, in ISO 4217 format (e.g., "USD").

v1MonthlyMeteringSummary.description: MonthlyMeteringSummary represents a single month's metering summary.

accountId.description: The identifier of the account (in GUID format).

accountName.description: The display name of the account.

clusters.description: The clusters that had usage in this month for this account.

v1UsageBreakdownAccount.description: UsageBreakdownAccount groups per-cluster usage for a single account in a given month.

clusterId.description: The identifier of the cluster (in GUID format).

clusterLabels.description: Labels associated with the cluster at the time of metering.

startTime.description: The start time of the metering window (UTC).

endTime.description: The end time of the metering window (UTC).

amountMillicents.description: The total charge for this entry, in millicents.

currency.description: Currency of the amount, in ISO 4217 format (e.g., "USD").

billableEntityType.description: The type of the billable entity (e.g., "cluster_booking", "backup", "inference_model").

clusterExtraDiskConfig.description: Set when billable_entity_type is "Cluster Extra Disk".

clusterStorageTierConfig.description: Set when billable_entity_type is "Cluster Storage Tier".

quantity.title:
Quantity of the metric consumed during the period (cluster-wide,
integrated over the period). Per-metric meaning:
  - Cluster: node-hours
  - Cluster Extra Disk: GiB-hours
  - Cluster Storage Tier: node-hours
  - Backup: GiB-hours
  - Inference Tokens: tokens

v1UsageBreakdownCluster.description: UsageBreakdownCluster represents the usage for a single cluster within a month.

month.description: The month this entry represents (1 = January, 12 = December).

accounts.description: The accounts that had usage in this month.

v1UsageBreakdownMonth.description: UsageBreakdownMonth groups usage for a single calendar month.
